verdict.text: Valencia (Carabobo) scores Avoid. Venezuela's third-largest city and industrial heartland has experienced the same patterns of state collapse, organised crime proliferation, and infrastructure failure as Caracas and Maracaibo. All three advisories cover Venezuela as Do Not Travel.

reconciliation.text: Gang activity, kidnapping, and robbery are all documented. Industrial decline has created severe unemployment, which drives crime. Carabobo state has also experienced gang-related violence connected to Venezuelan prison power structures operating on the street.
The same guidance as Caracas applies. If visiting for family or industrial/humanitarian reasons, specialist security arrangements are required. Do not travel independently.
